span.p:
ConnectionPoolMonitor runs periodic health checks (default 30s).
Detects: utilisation above 80 percent, pending threads above 3,
failure rate above 5 percent, and potential connection leak risk.
Pool is shared across all test classes — double-checked-lock singleton.

span.p:
DatabaseTestLifecycle.afterAll() does NOT close the pool.
The pool is shared across test classes and is only closed
on JVM shutdown via the registered shutdown hook.
